_comment: Dynamic.xyz test-mode credentials for dogfooding BUFI without a real wallet. Bypasses MetaMask/SIWE entirely — Dynamic provisions a Turnkey embedded wallet on first login.

_usage.ui: Click 'Log in or sign up' → choose Email or Phone → enter test value → enter OTP 967140
_usage.browse: After page loads, drive Dynamic widget input fields and submit OTP
_usage.note: ECHO subteam should default to this path when MetaMask connect is flaky on local dev
